# CodeRipple Tech

> CodeRipple Tech builds small, focused developer and productivity tools.
> Founded by Dan Negoescu. Contact: dan.negoescu4@gmail.com.

## Products

- [Ripplebug](https://coderippletech.com/ripplebug/): Chrome and Edge extension
  for bug reporting. One click captures a screenshot, screen recording, console
  log and network log, then files a complete ticket to Azure DevOps, GitHub,
  Jira, Linear, GitLab or Trello, or onto a hosted kanban triage board at
  https://board.coderippletech.com. Guests can report bugs through a share
  link without an account. The extension is free; the hosted board is free
  while in beta. Install:
  https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/ripplebug/hgbejokcghdecljpjgbniplicahlfaan

- [Ripple Import](https://coderippletech.com/ripple-import/): monday.com board
  view app that imports CSV and Excel files into monday.com boards. Smart
  column mapping, subitem and multi-level hierarchy detection, duplicate
  update-or-skip, templates and exports. Free plan: 10 imports/month.
  Pro $10/account/month, Business $20/account/month, billed through the
  monday.com marketplace. Usage guide: https://coderippletech.com/guide

- [Ripple Preview](https://coderippletech.com/ripple-preview/): free,
  MIT-licensed Umbraco backoffice package (Umbraco 17.3+). Renders Block Grid,
  Block List, Rich Text and Single Block entries through the site's own Razor
  views, stylesheets and scripts, so editors see the real page while editing.
  NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/packages/RipplePreview
  Source: https://github.com/negoescg/RipplePreview

## Key pages

- [Ripple Import guide](https://coderippletech.com/guide): full how-to for
  imports, subitems, multi-level boards, updates and exports.
- [Ripple Import privacy](https://coderippletech.com/privacy): the app runs
  client-side; no user data is collected or transmitted.
- [Ripple Import terms](https://coderippletech.com/terms)
- [Ripplebug privacy](https://coderippletech.com/ripplebug/privacy/)
